zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Proude於1549年出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞時，她的父親William Proude42歲，母親Rose Serle38歲。她於1549年9月2日與Ellnor Proude在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。她去世於1584年11月23日在她的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Proude于1549年出生在英国肯特坎特布瑞时，她的父亲William Proude42岁，母亲Rose Serle38岁。她于1549年9月2日与Ellnor Proude在英国英格兰肯特结婚。她去世于1584年11月23日在她的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Proude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Proud
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): nickname for a vain or haughtyman, from Middle English prod, prud ‘proud’ (late OldEnglish prūd, from the oblique form of Old Frenchproz).

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Proude was born in 1549, in Canterbury, Kent, England, her father, William Proude, was 42 and her mother, Rose Serle, was 38. She married Ellnor Proude on 2 September 1549, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. She died on 23 November 1584, in her hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Proude est née en 1549, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Proude, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Rose Serle, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Ellnor Proude le 2 septembre 1549, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1584, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Proude 1549 in Canterbury, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Proude 42 und ihre Mutter Rose Serle 38. Sie hat am 2. September 1549 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Ellnor Proude geheiratet. Sie starb am 23. November 1584 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Proude è nata il nel 1549 nel Canterbury, Kent, England, sua padre, William Proude, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Rose Serle, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Ellnor Proude il 2 settembre 1549, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 23 novembre 1584, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Proudeが1549年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで生まれた時，父William Proudeは42歳，母Rose Serleは38歳であった。1549年9月2日にイギリスイギリスケントでEllnor Proudeと結婚した。彼女は1584年11月23日に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Proude(이)가 1549년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Proude(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose Serle(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1549년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Ellnor Proude(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1584년 11월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Proude nasceu em 1549, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Proude, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Rose Serle, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Ellnor Proude em 2 de setembro de 1549, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1584, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Proude родилась в 1549 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William Proude было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Rose Serle, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ellnor Proude 2 сентября 1549 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 23 ноября 1584 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Proude nació en 1549, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Proude, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Rose Serle, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Ellnor Proude el 2 de septiembre de 1549, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1584, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
